# Release Notes: vX.Y.Z

## Overview
Briefly describe the focus of this release (e.g., "This release adds support for X and fixes a bug in Y").

## Action Required: Breaking Changes
- [ ] List any breaking changes for operators (e.g., "MCP_TRANSPORT=http is now deprecated").
- [ ] List any breaking changes for tool consumers (e.g., "clockify_create_project now requires X").

## New Features
- Feature 1: Description and how to use it.
- Feature 2: Description and how to use it.

## Bug Fixes
- Fix 1: Description of the fix.
- Fix 2: Description of the fix.

## Operational Changes
- **Database Migrations:** Yes/No. If yes, describe the impact and rollback steps.
- **New Environment Variables:** List any new variables and their defaults.
- **Metrics/Alerts:** Changes to SLIs or burn-rate thresholds.

## Security
- [ ] Trivy scan findings for the release image.
- [ ] SBOM updates.
- [ ] Signature and attestation verification instructions.

## Contributors
Huge thanks to @user1, @user2 for their contributions!
